figures.caption: Table 1: Minimum noise multiplier σ required to achieve a target (ε, δ) under different accounting methods. Bold entries indicate the lowest noise among formal end-to-end DP methods, including any values within one unit of the third significant digit for our line search precision (a relative difference of ≤ 1%). The optimistic Monte Carlo approach lacks a formal DP guarantee, but yields the lowest noise multiplier across all regimes.
